description: 4 SOQL queries replacing the 5 manual Salesforce Excel exports for the BDR territory map.

notes.accounts: All ICP accounts created since program start. Account_Tier__c != null is the ICP filter. Returns ~25k records — more comprehensive than the Excel report which was filtered to BDR-owned accounts only.
notes.pipeline: Open pipeline only (IsClosed=false). Multiple opps per account are resolved in data_processor.py — highest-priority stage wins.
notes.customers: Accounts at active customer stages. Implementation + 1+ Module Live + All Modules Live = ~148 customers.
notes.activities: Aggregate query: one row per account with their most recent task date. MAX(CreatedDate) used since ActivityDate doesn't support MAX. Returns ~8k distinct accounts with activity since Jan 2023.

queries.accounts: SELECT Id, Name, BillingState, Account_Tier__c, Owner.Name, Population__c, Legacy_Community_Development_Soft_Pick__c, CreatedDate FROM Account WHERE Account_Tier__c != null AND CreatedDate >= 2021-03-10T00:00:00Z ORDER BY BillingState, Name
queries.pipeline: SELECT AccountId, Account.Name, StageName, ARR_Formula__c FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND StageName IN ('Initial Interest', 'Meeting Booked', 'Sales Qualified', 'Demo', 'Proposal', 'Verbal')
queries.customers: SELECT Id, Name, BillingState, Account_Status__c, Current_ARR_Dlrs__c, Legacy_Community_Development_Soft_Pick__c FROM Account WHERE Account_Status__c IN ('Implementation', '1+ Module Live', 'All Modules Live')
queries.activities: SELECT AccountId, MAX(CreatedDate) FROM Task WHERE AccountId != null AND ActivityDate >= 2023-01-01 GROUP BY AccountId
